items.prompt: generates bounded tables and ordered pairs from a simple linear or proportional rule and plots them accurately
items.expected_evidence: generate ordered pairs from simple rules and plot them accurately
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner correctly coordinates rule, table, and plotted points.

items.prompt: explains how a table, graph, and verbal rule can represent the same linear relationship and what the constant change means
items.expected_evidence: explain how a table, a set of points, and a verbal rule can represent the same relationship
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains the common relationship structure across representations.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to table_graph_disconnect.
items.expected_evidence: identify constant change or constant multiplicative rate in bounded linear or proportional tables
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer broke the mapping between table values and plotted points.

items.prompt: succeeds across tables, verbal rules, graphs, and simple contextual representations of linear relationships
items.expected_evidence: interpret what slope-like change means in bounded contexts without collapsing all patterns into additive sameness
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves linear-relationship meaning across varied representations and contexts.
